h6aa04a4bg5d7fg4391g86e8g7bb2f50a081f: Well met! I am a magical projection of Gale of Waterdeep, and if you see this manifestation, that means I have prematurely perished.
h73901c61g4b6ag4d37gb835g535c34664c35: However, for reasons that cannot be disclosed, it is of vital importance that my death be remedied at your earliest convenience.
h10fffaf3g509dg4ed8gb021gb8471062edd7: You may rest assured that I do not speak out of self preservation alone: many lives depend on my return to the living within the span of two days.
h83176845g3ed4g4713ga77fg8b9880bec251: I trust I have made myself clear?
hb12451c9g0894g4150g9156g0d0ee6a86c32: My god does not yet grant me the ability to perform such a deed.
h56a4970ag939fg4383g970dge32ba6e23803: How am I supposed to bring you back to life?
hd9f4daa2gacb6g45e0g8e4eg64dab76049e7: I have upon my deceased person a magical item that can accomplish my return, but such is its value and rarity that it is protected by a multi-layered security protocol.
hb4b5f443gceecg46dagb4c8gf0d14d61fd13: I will now explain the protocol:
h56ea5f47g42f4g4860gab87g6e6240e87cf3: Step one is to retrieve from my person a pouch I wear over my heart.
h2fd3240eg02e2g4f0agb501g9d3e2456845f: Next you must unthread the purple seam that seals it in a counter clockwise fashion. Do not touch any other coloured strand.
h08ea950aga341g4026ga802g9b12a757efc6: Inside the pouch you will find a folded letter and a tiny flute. Unfold the letter, and note the markings in the top and bottom corners. These are the notes you need to play.
h8e0172c4g1276g469eg9120g720b47fa7021: Starting from the bottom right, play the notes in correct order - clockwise this time.
h385beb34g0ec5g458agb589g1843ae164c40: Upon completion of the tune, a magma mephit will appear, which will pose the following question: I'ss k'cha t'chiss n'aga?
hca04d449gb428g4694g9835gfd8eb92b56e7: This is Ignan for: What is my name? The answer is: K'ha'ssji'trach'ash.
h038ea6d1g6a70g4505gb854g34e818482302: Pronounce the name correctly and the mephit will breathe on the letter. Stay clear because the little scamp can melt metal.
hb63f5d2bg4228g4307g9245g9d072aa87967: Words will now appear on the letter's surface, effectively turning the letter into a Scroll of True Resurrection. Use it to bring me back to life.
h49f443b9gca35g4189ga449g628f73a1a7a6: That's a very interesting protocol. I'm impressed.
h07aedc42gbe0eg4091gabf7g4e62a0172adb: Thank you. Now repeat my instructions back to me, please.
h36f75b81g5e61g44b5g9d1bg32ec2fdd1ef4: Humour me. I need to be absolutely certain you understand.
h2a9faaf7g94d2g454egb733gf782c0ae7a9a: Fine, I'll play along. Step one: retrieve the pouch.
